verse.verse_3: Wa inna laka la'ajran gaira mamnūn(in).
verse.verse_7: Inna rabbaka huwa a‘lamu biman ḍalla ‘an sabīlih(ī), wa huwa a‘lamu bil-muhtadīn(a).
verse.verse_10: Wa lā tuṭi‘ kulla ḥallāfim mahīn(in).
verse.verse_14: An kāna żā māliw wa banīn(a).
verse.verse_17: Innā balaunāhum kamā balaunā aṣḥābal-jannah(ti), iż aqsamū layaṣrimunnahā muṣbiḥīn(a).
verse.verse_19: Fa ṭāfa ‘alaihā ṭā'ifum mir rabbika wa hum nā'imūn(a).
verse.verse_28: Qāla ausaṭuhum alam aqul lakum lau lā tusabbiḥūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Qālū subḥāna rabbinā innā kunnā ẓālimīn(a).
verse.verse_31: Qālū yā wailanā innā kunnā ṭāgīn(a).
verse.verse_32: ‘Asā rabbunā ay yubdilanā khairam minhā innā ilā rabbinā rāgibūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Każālikal-‘ażāb(u), wa la‘ażābul-ākhirati akbar(u), lau kānū ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_39: Am lakum aimānun ‘alainā bāligatun ilā yaumil-qiyāmah(ti), inna lakum lamā taḥkumūn(a).
verse.verse_41: Am lahum syurakā'(u), falya'tū bisyurakā'ihim in kānū ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_42: Yauma yuksyafu ‘an sāqiw wa yud‘auna ilas-sujūdi falā yastaṭī‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_43: Khāsyi‘atan abṣāruhum tarhaquhum żillah(tun), wa qad kānū yud‘auna ilas-sujūdi wa hum sālimun(a).
verse.verse_44: Fażarnī wa may yukażżibu bihāżal-ḥadīṡi sanastadrijuhum min ḥaiṡu lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_45: Wa umlī lahum, inna kaidī matīn(un).
verse.verse_46: Am tas'aluhum ajran fahum mim magramim muṡqalūn(a).
verse.verse_48: Faṣbir liḥukmi rabbika wa lā takun kaṣāḥibil-ḥūt(i), iż nādā wa huwa makẓūm(un).
verse.verse_49: Lau lā an tadārakahū ni‘matum mir rabbihī lanubiża bil-‘arā'i wa huwa mażmūm(un).
verse.verse_51: Wa iy yakādul-lażīna kafarū layuzliqūnaka bi'abṣārihim lammā sami‘uż żikra wa yaqūlūna innahū lamajnūn(un).
verse.verse_52: Wa mā huwa illā żikrul lil-‘ālamīn(a).
